alert.title: 第一案：爱因斯坦仍在德国
alert.summary: 目标未按基准历史离境。建议先核验来源与基准档案，再决定是否干预。

windows.archives: 档案库 / 待核验记录

labels.timeline_heading: 检测到基准历史不一致

intel.classification: 紧急 / 柏林来源 B-17
lines: 对象：阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦
intel.message:
对象 E 仍处于德国境内。
预期离境窗口已经关闭。
可能存在未知力量介入。
intel.system_note:
在基准历史中，1933 年希特勒上台后，阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦没有返回德国。
当前世界线指标显示，他仍可能停留在柏林 / 卡普特附近。

请判断这究竟是来源错误、档案不一致、蓄意误导，还是世界线分歧。
intel.suggestion: 直接干预前，先核验来源可信度与基准档案。

timeline: 1933-01-30  希特勒被任命为德国总理
1933-03-XX  基准：爱因斯坦预计不会返回德国
1933-03-27  [异常] 对象 E 仍被追踪至柏林附近
1933-04-07  职业公务员法通过，学术清洗加剧
1933-10-XX  基准：爱因斯坦加入普林斯顿高等研究院

map.baseline_route: 德国 -> 比利时 -> 英国 -> 美国
map.current_trace: 柏林 / 卡普特走廊尚未排除

本案涉及反犹迫害、国家暴力、流亡与学术清洗。所有干预都应视为高风险。

feedback.map: 地图轨迹：柏林 / 卡普特走廊进入复核。

alert.title: First case: Einstein remains in Germany
alert.summary: Subject missed the baseline departure window. Verify source and baseline records before intervention.

intel.message:
Subject E remains within German territory.
Expected departure window has closed.
Unknown party may have intervened.
intel.system_note:
In the baseline history, Albert Einstein did not return to Germany after Hitler's rise in 1933.
Current timeline indicators suggest he remains near Berlin / Caputh.

Please determine whether this is source error, archive inconsistency, deliberate misinformation, or timeline divergence.
intel.suggestion: Before direct action, verify both source credibility and baseline records.

timeline: 1933-03-XX  Baseline: Einstein expected not to return to Germany
1933-03-27  [ANOMALY] Subject E still traced near Berlin
1933-04-07  Law for the Restoration of the Professional Civil Service
en.historical_notice:
Historical sensitivity notice:
This case involves antisemitic persecution, state violence, exile, and academic purges. Treat all interventions as high-risk.

feedback.timeline: Timeline focus: March-April 1933 divergence window highlighted.
feedback.map: Map trace: Berlin / Caputh unresolved corridor marked for review.
feedback.archives: Archives query: baseline records and missing border evidence queued.
feedback.source: Source B-17 verification: reliability medium, propaganda risk high.
feedback.directive: Field directive draft opened. Intervention remains locked pending source review.

en.notification_ready: System ready. Unread urgent dispatch loaded into Intel Desk.
